phrases.text_local: Sabes onde ficam as estátuas de deuses romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bihsh OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DIH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Sim, pergunte ao jardineiro ou ao concierge para indicações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo OHW OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, ask the head gardener or the concierge for directions.

responses.english: Yes, ask the head gardener or the concierge for directions.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo OHW OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH.
responses.local: Sim, pergunte ao jardineiro ou ao concierge para indicações.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tivoli Café terrace is
phrases.text_local: Pergunte ao concierge ou ao jardineiro.
phrases.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih OHW OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo.
phrases.cultural_note: The Tivoli Café terrace is a prominent feature within Seteais Gardens, often used for afternoon tea and enjoying the view of the palace.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao concierge ou ao jardineiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih OHW OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the concierge or the gardener.

responses.english: Ask the concierge or the gardener.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih OHW OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte ao concierge ou ao jardineiro.

phrases.text_local: Onde estão as estátuas dos deuses romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao jardineiro ou ao segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the gardener or the security guard.

responses.english: Ask the gardener or the security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao jardineiro ou ao segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the central fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a bacia da fonte central?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH buh-SEEUH DUH FOHNG-tih sayngt-RAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: Fontes ornamentais marcam o eixo central de parques sintrenses.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no centro do jardim.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the center of the garden.

responses.english: Good morning, in the center of the garden.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO SAYNGT-roo DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN.
responses.local: Bom dia, no centro do jardim.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço do Tivoli Café?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO tee-voo-LEE kuh-FEH?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao concierge sobre o terraço do Tivoli Café.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih SOHB-rih AW teh-RAH-soo DOO tee-voo-LEE kuh-FEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the concierge about the Tivoli Café terrace.

responses.english: Ask the concierge about the Tivoli Café terrace.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW koong-SEEEH-ruh-zhih SOHB-rih AW teh-RAH-soo DOO tee-voo-LEE kuh-FEH.
responses.local: Pergunte ao concierge sobre o terraço do Tivoli Café.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the boxwood parterres are
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontram os canteiros de buxo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruhng OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh DIH BOO-shoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Buxos podados refletem a tradição paisagística europeia em Sintra.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao jardineiro sobre os canteiros de buxo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zhuh-ruh-dee-NAY-roo SOHB-rih OOSH kahnng-TAY-roosh DIH BOO-shoo.

responses.local: Pergunte ao jardineiro sobre os canteiros de buxo.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DIH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Roman god statues are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as estátuas dos deuses romanos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Estátuas clássicas são comuns em jardins históricos portugueses.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para as estátuas dos deuses romanos.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Roman god statues.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Roman god statues.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH SHTAH-toouhsh DOOSH DEHOO-zihsh roo-MAHN-noosh.
